name: Bandhan Bank Limited
summary: Bandhan Bank Limited provides commercial banking services in India. It operates through Treasury, Retail Banking, Corporate/Wholesale Banking, and Other Banking Business segments. The company offers savings, current, fixed deposit, and corporate salary accounts. It also provides retail loans, such as home loans, two wheeler loans, and loans against property and term deposits, as well as personal and gold loans; MSME loans, including business, equipment, commercial vehicle, working capital, and term loans; small enterprise loans; microloans for home-based businesses; and agriculture loans. In addition, the company invests in sovereign securities; offers liability products, card services, Internet and mobile banking, ATM, trading, and NRI services; and distributes third party products. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 1,018 branches, 3,346 banking units, 195 home loan centers, and 485 ATMs. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India. Bandhan Bank Limited is a subsidiary of Bandhan Financial Holdings Limited.
